title: List of Comrades for Legacy — six-name OSU friend-group enumeration
html:
List of Comrades for Legacy — six-name OSU friend-group enumeration

Source: 2025-05-13 Apple Note. A bare six-name list under a tellingly load-bearing title. Same day as the "For graduation" note — Yahir is in legacy-audit mode the week of OSU graduation.

TL;DR

  • The six comrades: Ryan Hogan, Henry Osmer, Hamza Beggoun, Nic Rist, Owen Davis, Huck Reed.
  • The framing word is "Legacy" — these are the people Yahir explicitly wants to carry into the next chapter, not just the people he saw last week.
  • Overlap with the 2022 fantasy roster (Owen Davis, Ryan, Kai/Ayden) is partial — this isn't the gym-and-football crew, it's a curated subset.
  • Huck Reed appears here AND in the May 20 side quests list ("Visit Patagonia with huck") — same week, suggesting Huck is the highest-priority comrade in this micro-window.
  • The legacy question template applied to people — same diagnostic instinct as "if I died today, was it worth it" but pointed at the relationship audit instead of the life audit.

Key quote

(title is the quote) — "List of Comrades for Legacy"

Pattern observed

This is one of three audit-style notes Yahir wrote in mid-May 2025: this list (comrades), the side quests list (adventures), and the Austin move plan (logistics). Together they form the graduation triptych — relationships, dreams, plan. He's pulling threads forward from college.

The contrast with the June 9 goodbyes list (Cameron Canfield, Yoonie, Liam Smyth, etc.) is that those are the people he saw to close out the chapter — these are the people he intends to keep.

Open questions

  • Why these six specifically? Most are from osu, but Huck Reed also surfaces in adventure-context (Patagonia) — different kind of bond?
  • Is Hamza Beggoun the same Hamza referenced anywhere else? Single-mention so far.
  • Is the absence of Cam Jipp meaningful here, given his pre-existing role in Yahir's friend-becomes-business-partner arc?
